title: Poison damage — poisonous monster affix + status tracking
problem: No poison mechanic existed. Status effects were player-only buffs (battle cry, iron skin, etc.) — monsters had no debuff they could apply to the player. This left combat feeling tactically flat for floor 3+ encounters.

lineage.spawnReason: deferred mechanic: poison was listed as a known gap in the elemental combat feature; status visuals were out of scope

analysis: StatusCounters already tracked player buffs with round counters. The pattern could extend to debuffs: poisonRoundsLeft + poisonDmgPerRound, decremented by tickCounters each round. Poison needed: (1) a new MonsterAffix 'poisonous', (2) a named variant (Venomfang Rat) showcasing it, (3) poison tick before each round in attackAction and skillAction, (4) poison application on successful poisonous monster hit at 30%, (5) 'poison' log entry type in theme.
implementation: 1. theme.ts: added 'poison' to LogEntryType, resolves to COLORS.green (plague green). 2. monsters.ts: added 'poisonous' to MonsterAffix and MONSTER_AFFIXES. Added NAMED_VARIANTS entry: Venomfang Rat (plague_rat base, poisonous+extraFast affixes, minFloor 3, 1.10x HP). 3. statusEffects.ts: added poisonRoundsLeft: number and poisonDmgPerRound: number to StatusCounters and ZERO_COUNTERS. tickCounters decrements poisonRoundsLeft and zeros poisonDmgPerRound when rounds reach 0. 4. combatStore.ts: in attackAction and skillAction, before applyCombatAction: if poisonRoundsLeft > 0, subtract poisonDmgPerRound from player HP and log 'Poisoned! -X HP (N rounds left)'. After applyCombatAction: if monster has poisonous affix and hit landed and rng() < 0.30, set poisonRoundsLeft=3, poisonDmgPerRound=max(2, round(damage[0]*0.15)), log 'POISONED — X damage per round for 3 rounds!'.

decisions.rationale: 15% of base damage per round is noticeable but survivable with potions. 3 rounds creates a window for decision-making (use potion now or tank it). Min 2 prevents trivial 1-damage poison on low floors.
Frequent enough to feel threatening on poisonous monsters, rare enough not to be a guaranteed death sentence combined with normal damage.

decisions.decision: Poison tick happens before attack resolution — player can die to poison alone
decisions.rationale: Poison that can kill creates real urgency. If it only reduced HP before the monster's counter, it would never actually kill. This makes poison dangerous in low-HP situations.

decisions.decision: New poison log entry type (plague green) rather than reusing 'enraged' (red)
decisions.rationale: Poison is a distinct threat from direct damage. Green separates it visually in the log so players can track it at a glance.

successCriteria: Venomfang Rat (floor 3+) can poison the player on hit. 'POISONED' appears in the combat log in green. Subsequent rounds show 'Poisoned! -X HP (N rounds left)'. Poison can kill if HP is low enough. Poison clears after 3 rounds.
knownLimitations: No antidote item — only HP potions can compensate for poison damage
Poison is not shown as a status icon in the CombatScreen stat line (only in the log)
Poison resets on each new infection rather than stacking — re-applying poison refreshes to 3 rounds
userGuide: Poisonous monsters (Venomfang Rats and any monster with the Poisonous affix) can infect you on hit. Watch the combat log for green text — poison deals damage each round before your action. Use HP potions to survive multi-round poison.
implementationNotes: Poison stored in StatusCounters.poisonRoundsLeft/poisonDmgPerRound — same pattern as skill buff counters
rng() call for poison check is after applyCombatAction — fresh rng per round so this doesn't shift test seeds
applySkillCounters preserves poisonRoundsLeft/poisonDmgPerRound since it calls tickCounters first then overrides only skill-specific fields

publicInterface.name: StatusCounters.poisonRoundsLeft
publicInterface.description: Rounds of poison remaining on the player. 0 = not poisoned.

publicInterface.name: StatusCounters.poisonDmgPerRound
publicInterface.description: Flat damage dealt per poison tick. Zeroed when poisonRoundsLeft reaches 0.

codeSnippets.label: Poison tick in attackAction (combatStore.ts)
Poison application after monster hit

revisions.author: claude
revisions.reason: Poison mechanic fully implemented this session
